component.summary: Utility to configure the GNOME desktop
設定 GNOME 桌面的工具程式
用来配置 GNOME 桌面的工具
Tiện ích để cấu hình môi trường máy tính để bàn GNOME
Програма для налаштовування середовища GNOME
GNOME masaüstünü yapılandırma aracı
เครื่องมือสำหรับตั้งค่าเดสก์ท็อป GNOME
Verktyg för att konfigurera GNOME-skrivbordet
Alatka za podešavanje Gnomovog radnog okruženja
Алатка за подешавање Гномовог радног окружења
Orodje za nastavljanje namizja GNOME
Nástroj na konfiguráciu prostredia GNOME
Инструмент для настройки рабочего стола GNOME
Utilitate de configurare pentru desktopul GNOME
Utilitário para configurar o ambiente GNOME
Utilitários para configurar o ambiente de trabalho GNOME
Narzędzie do konfigurowania środowiska GNOME
ਗਨੋਮ ਡੈਸਕਟਾਪ ਦੀ ਸੰਰਚਨਾ ਵਾਸਤੇ ਸਹੂਲਤ
Utilitari per configurar l’environament GNOME
Hulpprogramma om het GNOME-bureaublad te configureren
जिनोम डेस्कटप कन्फिगर गर्ने युटिलिटी
Still inn systemet ditt
နုန်ဒက်စ်တော့ပ်ကို ပြင်ဆင်ရန်အတွက် လက်သုံးကိရိယာ
Utiliti untuk mengkonfigur atas meja GNOME
Utilītprogramma GNOME darbvirsmas konfigurēšanai
Įrankis GNOME grafinės aplinkos konfigūravimui
그놈 데스크톱 설정 프로그램
GNOME жұмыс үстелін баптау утилитасы
სამუშაო გარემო GNOME-ის მორგების პროგრამა
GNOME デスクトップの設定ユーティリティ
Applicazione per configurare l'ambiente grafico GNOME
Tól til að stilla GNOME skjáborðsumhverfið
Utilitas untuk mengonfigurasi destop GNOME
Segédprogram a GNOME asztali környezet személyre szabásához
Pomagalo za podešavanje GNOME radne površine
गनोम डेस्कटॉप को विन्यस्त करने की उपयोगिता
כלים להגדרת שולחן העבודה GNOME
Utilidades para configurar o escritorio GNOME
Utilitât par configurâ l'ambient grafic GNOME
Utilitaire pour configurer l’environnement GNOME
Työkalu Gnome-työpöydän asetusten muokkaukseen
ابزاری برای پیکربندی میزکار گنوم
GNOME mahaigaina konfiguratzeko utilitatea
Utilidad para configurar el escritorio GNOME
Ilo por agordi la labortablon de GNOME
Utility to configure the GNOME desktop
Εργαλείο για τη ρύθμιση του GNOME
Dienstprogramme zur Einrichtung der GNOME Arbeitsumgebung
Redskab til at konfigurere GNOME-skrivebordet
Nástroj pro nastavení uživatelského prostředí GNOME
ئامرازێکە بۆ ڕێکخستنی ڕوومێزی گنۆم
Utilitats per a configurar l'escriptori GNOME
জিনোম ডেস্কটপ কনফিগার করতে ইউটিলিটি
Инструменти за настройването на работната среда GNOME
Utylita dla kanfihuravannia asiaroddzia GNOME
Утыліта для канфігуравання асяроддзя GNOME
أدوات لضبط سطح مكتب جنوم

description.p: Settings is the primary interface for configuring your system.
《設定》是設定系統的主要介面。
“设置”是配置您的系统的主要界面。
Cài đặt là giao diện chính để cấu hình hệ thống của bạn.
«Параметри» є основним інтерфейсом для налаштовування вашої системи.
Ayarlar, sisteminizi yapılandırmak için birincil arayüzdür.
"การตั้งค่า" เป็นส่วนติดต่อหลักที่ใช้ตั้งค่าต่างๆ ของระบบคุณ
Inställningar är det primära gränssnittet för att konfigurera ditt system.
Podešavanja su glavno sredstvo za podešavanje vašeg sistema.
Подешавања су главно средство за подешавање вашег система.
Program je osnovni vmesnik za prilagajanje nastavitev sistema.
Aplikácia Nastavenia je hlavným rozhraním na konfiguráciu vášho systému.
Настройки — основной интерфейс для настройки вашей системы.
Configurări este interfața primară pentru a vă configura sistemul.
Configurações é a interface primária para configurar seu sistema.
Definições é a sua interface principal para configurar o seu sistema.
Główny interfejs do konfigurowania komputera.
ਸੈਟਿੰਗਾਂ ਤੁਹਾਡੇ ਸਿਸਟਮ ਦੀ ਸੰਰਚਨਾ ਕਰਨ ਲਈ ਮੁੱਢਲਾ ਦਰ ਹੈ।
Paramètres es l’interfàcia principala de configuracion del sistèma.
Instellingen is de hoofdinterface voor de configuratie van uw systeem.
तपाईँको प्रणाली कन्फिगर गर्नका लागि सेटिङ प्राथमिक इन्टरफेस हो ।

Innstillinger lar deg endre systeminnstillinger raskt og enkelt. Med en ryddig inndeling og et bevisst utvalg av tilgjengelige innstillinger, er det lett å finne frem til akkurat det du trenger å endre.
သတ််မှတ်ချက်များ(Settings)သည် သင်၏စစ်စတမ်ကို စီမခန့်ခွဲရန်အတွက် အဓိကအသုံးပြုရမည့် ပရိုဂရမ်ဖြစ်သည်။
Tetapan ialah antara muka utama untuk Mengkonfigur sistem anda.
“Iestatījumi” ir galvenā sistēmas konfigurēšanas saskarne.
Nustatymai yra pirminė sąsaja jūsų sistemos konfigūravimui.
설정은 시스템을 설정하는 주요 인터페이스 프로그램입니다.
Баптаулар қолданбасы жүйеңізді баптаудың негізгі сайманы болып табылады.
მორგება - თქვენი სისტემის პარამეტრების გამართვის მთავარი ადგილი.
“設定”はシステム設定用のプライマリインターフェースです。
«Impostazioni» è il programma principale per la configurazione del sistema.
Stillingar er aðalviðmótið til að laga stillingar kerfisins þíns.
Pengaturan adalah antarmuka utama untuk mengkonfigurasi sistem Anda.
A Beállítások az elsődleges felület a rendszer beállításához.
Postavke su glavno sučelje za podešavanje vašeg sustava.
सेटिंग्स आपके सिस्टम को विन्यस्त करने के लिए प्राथमिक इंटरफ़ेस है।
הגדרות הוא הממשק העיקרי להגדיר את המערכת שלך.
Preferencias é a interface principal para configurar o seu sistema.
Impostazions e je la interface principâl par configurâ il sisteme.
Paramètres est l’interface principale de configuration du système.
Asetukset on ensisijainen käyttöliittymä järjestelmäsi asetusten määrittämiseen.
تنظیمات، واسط اصلی برای پیکربندی سامانه‌تان است.
Ezarpenak zure sistema konfiguratzeko interfaze nagusia da.
Configuración es la interfaz principal para configurar su sistema.
Agordoj estas la ĉefa fasado por agordi vian sistemon.
Settings is the primary interface for configuring your system.
Οι ρυθμίσεις είναι η κύρια διεπαφή για τη διαμόρφωση του συστήματός σας.
Einstellungen ist die wichtigste Komponente zur Einrichtung Ihres Systems.
Indstillinger er den primære grænseflade til konfigurering af dit system.
Aplikace Nastavení je hlavním rozhraním pro nastavení vašeho systému.
El Paràmetres és la interfície principal per a configurar el sistema.
আপনার সিস্টেমটি কনফিগার করার জন্য সেটিংস হল প্রাথমিক ইন্টারফেস।
Това е основният интерфейс за настройването на системата ви.
Nałady — heta asnoŭny interfiejs dla kanfihuravannia sistemy.
Налады — гэта асноўны інтэрфейс для канфігуравання сістэмы.

component.developer_name: GNOME ပရောဂျက်

developer.name: The GNOME Project

GNOME 项目

ਗਨੋਮ ਪਰੋਜੈਕਟ
Lo projècte GNOME
Het GNOME-project
जिनोम परियोजना
GNOME
GNOME ပရောဂျက်
Projek GNOME
The GNOME Project
GNOME projekts
GNOME projektas
그놈 프로젝트
GNOME жобасы
Asenfar n GNOME
პროექტი "GNOME"
The GNOME Project
Il progetto GNOME
GNOME verkefnið
Li projecte GNOME
Proyek GNOME
A GNOME projekt
GNOME projekt
गनोम परियोजना
מיזם GNOME
O proxecto GNOME
Il progjet GNOME
Le projet GNOME
Gnome-projekti
پروژهٔ گنوم
GNOME proiektua
El Proyecto GNOME
La GNOME Projekto
The GNOME Project
Το έργο GNOME
Das GNOME-Pojekt
GNOME-projektet
Projekt GNOME
El projecte GNOME
জিনোম প্রকল্প
Проектът GNOME
Prajekt GNOME
Праект GNOME
The GNOME Project

ul.li: Fix multiple GPU name display with NVIDIA GPU on Desktop PC
Fix crash when modifying app notification settings multiple times
Improve password generation logic and word list
Get motion history from tablets in test drawing area
Various additional fixes, translation updates and UI/UX tweaks
Fix duplicated "Search" rows in the Keyboard Custom Shortcut settings
Fix saving printer detail changes
Various additional fixes, translation updates and UI/UX tweaks
Use static hostname when displaying hostname based addresses
Various translation updates
Handle when tuned-ppd has an unsupported power profile
Fix wrong GPU names when Settings is launched using dGPU
Update Notification settings when the underlying setting changes
Make metered connection and hotspot settings adaptive to small screens
Prevent crash in Sound Volume Levels when stream has no name
Make screen reader read user avatar file names when there are no names
Various fixes to the color calibration tool
Various translation updates
Update Mouse illustrations and avoid dependency on gstreamer-plugins-bad
Fix accidental reset of accent color setting
Fix some memory leaks in the App settings
Ensure color profiles are connected before operating on them
Simplify Crosshair length slider in Accessibility Zoom settings
Fix alignment of status pages in the Mobile Networks settings
Remove wrong tooltip in the "Add Printer" button
Various translation updates
Fix performance issue when loading Backgrounds
Hide "Remote Desktop" row when service is not available
Fix value of system language row after selecting new language
Fix crash when handling unkown stylus IDs in the Wacom settings
Fix untranslated account provider info text
Various translation updates
Modernize the "Add User" dialog
Implement accent colors
Move "Screen Reader" settings to the top of the Accessibility settings
Rename "Reduce Animation" setting to "Animation Effects"
Rename "File and Link Associations" page to "Files and Links"
Add "Activate Windows on Hover" setting to Accessibility settings
Show status page when Parental Controls aren't available
Don't show "App is not sandboxed" banner for system components
Rename "File and Link Associations" page to "Files and Links"
Adapt display rotation labels to the screen ratio
Add suspend time options for mobile devices
Load input choice locales asynchronously in Keyboard settings
Fix "Move" buttons in Keyboard settings
Remove references to now retired Mozilla Location Services
Use accent colors for the animations in the Mouse settings
Don't set empty ignored hosts in Network settings
Turn "App Notifications" dialog into a subpage
Add a notifications overlay to the Online Accounts settings
Respect user account password enforcing based on pwquality configs
Sort fingerprint list with the most used options on top
Show correctly the list of remanining fingerprint options to enroll
Various user interface improvements to the Printer PPD selection dialog
Fix crash of the SIM Unlock dialog on Mobile Networks settings
Various icon artwork updates in the Accessibility settings
Improve description of "Default Apps" settings
Turn app settings dialogs into subpages
Fix "No Search Results" page in Apps settings
Don't show "Open" button for Settings itself in App settings
Show the number of static permissions in the "Required Access" row in App settings
Indicate when no apps are available for a mime type in "Default Apps"
Improve window preview style in Appearance settings
Modernize looks of the Color settings
Rename "Laptop Screen" to "Built-In Screen"
Fix Displays panel crash when closing laptop lid
Add icon to the Night Light settings in Display settings
Allow previewing keyboard layouts in Input Sources dialog
Remove primary indicator delay for Mouse Test dialog
Make Mouse Test not respond to middle click
Make the WiFi QR Code dialog contents readable by screen readers
Add 6GHz to the "Supported Frequencies" in WiFi settings
Sort VPNs list in Network settings
Fix row removal when a Bluetooth Wifi device is removed
Add stable-ssid support for cloned-mac
Rename Windows Live provider to "Microsoft" in Online Accounts
Rename MS365 provider in Online Accounts
Close new online account dialog when account creation is complete
Modernize Printer Jobs dialog
Modernize Printer Details dialog
Fix spelling inconsistency for the word "Cancelled"
Close "Add Printer" dialog when pressing "Escape" key
Improve text description of the Sharing features
Add DAV address in the File Sharing dialog
Add notice about shared files not being encrypted
Hide Sharing settings panel when none of the Sharing features are available in the system
Use AppInfo to get app icons and fallback to icon-theme in the Sound settings
Adjust sound of the "Click" sound effect closer to the freedesktop.org bell sound
Make sound setting sliders more accessible with keyboard
Load subpages on demand to speed up System settings panel startup
Don't show unwanted system accounts in User settings
Fix parental controls settings visibility in User settings
Rename "Add Enterprise User" to "Add Enterprise Login" in User settings
Always allow calibration for display tablets in Wacom settings
Enforce a Z-shape sequence of calibration points in Wacom settings
Fix wrong alignment detection in the calibrator in Wacom settings
Reset the clock after any click on the calibrator in Wacom settings
Up the calibrator threshold to 50 pixels in Wacom settings
Fall back to the generic tablet provided by libwacom in Wacom settings
Fix accessibility regression when reading wallpaper names
Handle opening GNOME Software when clicking "View Details" of webapps
Use the new file chooser portal when adding new folder to "Media Sharing"
Fix visibility of action buttons in the Color settings
Improve performance when loading Wallpapers
Avoid crash in App settings when handling invalid permissions
Update feedback icons for validating user names and password settings
Fix adding "Shared Media" folders
Fix crash when unplugging removable WiFi adapter
Various widgets ported to modern libadwaita widgets
Various dialogs have been ported to subpages
Various translation updates
Various CI fixes
